diagrams.title: CPU-Memory Hierarchy with Cache
diagrams.description: Shows the placement of cache between CPU and main memory in the memory hierarchy
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where cache fits in the overall memory hierarchy and relative speeds

diagrams.title: Cache Address Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how a memory address is divided into tag, index, and offset fields for cache lookup
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how cache determines if data is present using address bits

diagrams.title: Cache Mapping Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares direct mapping, associative mapping, and set-associative mapping visually
elements: Direct Map: Fixed slot per block
Set-Associative: Any slot in specific set
Conflict points shown in direct mapping
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different mapping techniques place blocks in cache

diagrams.title: Write-Through vs Write-Back
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of data for both write policies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference in data flow and when main memory is updated
